message:
chore: Add comprehensive testing requirements to beads + code fixes

Beads updates:
- Updated 6 EPICs with Testing Requirements, Logging Specifications,
  Error Handling, and Performance Targets sections
- Updated 7 feature beads with comprehensive test specifications
- Updated 14+ task beads with specific test requirements
- Created 6 new E2E test beads covering TUI, Agent, Install, MCP,
  Container/GPU detection, and Observability
- Linked all new test beads to their parent EPICs and Testing EPIC

Code fixes:
- signal.rs: Cache boot_id with OnceLock to avoid repeated /proc reads
- e2e_plan.rs: Extend test timeout to 600s for debug builds/slow CI

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
